description: Backup/Restore Complete Test Matrix - CRC/Small Cluster (10 workspaces per test)

custom_tests.name: backup_10_single_ns_external_correct
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 10 --max-devworkspaces 10 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces false --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 600 --test-duration-minutes 10 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type correct --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 15
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + External registry (quay.io) + Correct config

custom_tests.name: backup_10_single_ns_external_incorrect
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 10 --max-devworkspaces 10 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces false --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 600 --test-duration-minutes 10 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type incorrect --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 15
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + External registry (quay.io) + Incorrect config (typo)

custom_tests.name: backup_10_single_ns_internal_correct
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + OpenShift internal registry + Correct config (auto-detect)

custom_tests.name: backup_10_single_ns_internal_incorrect
custom_tests.description: Single namespace + OpenShift internal registry + Incorrect config (invalid registry)

custom_tests.name: backup_10_separate_ns_external_correct
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 10 --max-devworkspaces 10 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces true --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 600 --test-duration-minutes 10 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type correct --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 15
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + External registry (quay.io) + Correct config

custom_tests.name: backup_10_separate_ns_external_incorrect
custom_tests.args: --mode binary --max-vus 10 --max-devworkspaces 10 --delete-devworkspace-after-ready false --separate-namespaces true --devworkspace-ready-timeout-seconds 600 --test-duration-minutes 10 --run-backup-test-hook true --dwoc-config-type incorrect --registry-path quay.io/rohan.kanojia --registry-secret quay-push-secret --backup-wait-minutes 15
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + External registry (quay.io) + Incorrect config (typo)

custom_tests.name: backup_10_separate_ns_internal_correct
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + OpenShift internal registry + Correct config (auto-detect)

custom_tests.name: backup_10_separate_ns_internal_incorrect
custom_tests.description: Separate namespaces + OpenShift internal registry + Incorrect config (invalid registry)
